titlestmt.titleproper: First Baptist Church of Covert records6038
titlestmt.author: Compiled by

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-08-12 18:57:15 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Baptist Church of Covert records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: First Baptist Church of Covert (Covert, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Contains one volume of covenant meeting minutes recording cases of church discipline, subscription policy, anti-Masonry, temperance, heresy and the mission controversy, with a membership list in the back.

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: This church was organized as the Baptist Church of Ovid and Hector on February 16, 1803 with 29 members. A meeting house was constructed. The church membership grew steadily with regular revivals. In 1820 the church left the Cayuga Baptist Association and joined the Seneca Baptist Association. Groups of members broke off at different times to form churches at Peach Orchard (Collection #6059) and other locations.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of one volume of covenant meeting minutes which record many cases of church discipline, the selection of new ministers and deacons, discussion of subscription policy, am reports of church activities. Other issues in this church record are anti-masonry, temperance, heresy, and the mission controversy. At the end of the volume is a membership list dating from 1803 indicating how each member was received into and left the church.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Baptist Church of Covert records, #6038. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Schuyler County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Freemasonry -- Religious aspects -- Baptists.
Revivals -- New York (State) -- Covert.
Church discipline.
Temperance and religion -- New York (State) -- Covert.
Baptists -- New York (State) -- Covert.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The volume opens with a preface written on April 26, 1804 (pp. 1-4) and a Confession of Faith (p. 5). On p. 11 are minutes of the council called upon to constitute the Baptist Church of Ovid and Hector on February 16, 1803. On p. 1$ begin the minutes of the church's monthly covenant meetings. These minutes record the name of the moderator appointed, the state of the church, the appointment of ministers, members received by baptism or letter, and many instances of church discipline. The minutes are good documentation of the church's development. Most of the bottom lines are illegible.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Missing.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes commence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Missing.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bro. is excluded for fornication with one woman and proposing to another.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Representatives are sent to constitute the First Baptist Church of Romulus.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Members from Peach Orchard request permission to meet separately.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Decision on how cases of public and private morality are to be handled.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Case of incest?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Member charges the church with holding the doctrine of election.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Family problems continued from p. 37.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bro. is excluded for desiring open communion.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One brother confesses intoxication. Many confessions and charges follow.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Doctrine of equality discussed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Doctrinal disagreement, heresy charges, minister expelled.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Members charged vith holding Universalist views.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Discussion of a fixed minister's salary.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A brother who has joined the Masons agreed not to attend often, but the congregation is not satisfied. Another confesses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two elders have a disagreement. Other churches are called in to confer. The church is censured

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Discussion continues over the problem with the elders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many new members; possible revival.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The church cannot spare Elder Thomas to go on a missionary tour.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Subscription collectors get 5% for "the trouble of" collecting.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church members dispute about land.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bro. is excluded after joining the Methodists.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sister is excluded for charging pn another's account.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted to establish an Act of Equality in the Church. (See the 5th page from the end)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bro. joins the Methodists.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sister embraces the Unitarian heresy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The church cares for a destitute woman.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The church requests dismission from the Cayuga Associate to join the Seneca Association.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Continued from p. 227. The sister is rejected for heresy adopted the "Smithite Doctrine" and Unitarian annihilatin doctrine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The church joins the Seneca Association.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pages missing or misnumbered.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sister excluded for joining the Methodist church and embracing Arminian and Unitarian sentiments.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Masonry /anti-Masonry discussed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "The Church in union with enlarged desires for a revival."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Protracted revival with many new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted to receive the brothers dropped from the Farmerville Church. (Interlaken, N.Y.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted to solicit subscriptions for the foreign missionary society.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted to postpone forming a missionary Society until May.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Missionary Society issue resolved.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pregnant, unmarried woman expelled.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bro. takes issue with the Act of Equality, and is excluded for refusing to pay.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A "meeting of days" is going on.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sr. joined the "Christians" [Disciples of Christ?]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A revival cancelled due to bad weather.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted to attend meeting at Farmerville where there is a great "work of the Lord."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 24 new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report of a two week long revival.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Revival.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolved not to allow non-religious meetings in the church

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two people excluded for joining the Methodists.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Revival

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted to have a season of protracted worship = Mar. 8.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Revival

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The church adopts the Articles of Faith and Covenant of the Baptist State Convention of Michigan.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Representatives asked to sit at the formation of the 2nd Baptist Church in Ithaca.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Possible revival.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Last minutes.
